title: Globally defined SV function breaks CXXRTL export

features.name: global_function_definition
features.description: Code should include a function definition at global scope (outside any module)

features.name: cxxrtl_blackbox_module
features.description: Code should include a module marked with the cxxrtl_blackbox attribute

features.name: module_instantiation_in_module
features.description: Code should include a module that instantiates another module with explicit port connections
